MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jared V. Walder, Esq., BIBIYAN LAW GROUP, P.C. (310) 438-5555 jared@tomorrowlaw.com
Attorney for Plaintiff, SHAWN NELSON BREWER and on behalf of himself and all others similarly situated.
A. Chowning Poppler, Esq., CHAN PUNZALAN LLP 415.839.0063 chowning@chanpunzalan.com
Attorneys for Defendant VitaWerks, Inc.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VITAWERKS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

Defendant VitaWerks, Inc.'s motion to quash service of summons is denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2024 Continued To Jan-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
